## nsc artifact describe

Describe an artifact's metadata.

```
nsc artifact describe [path] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for describe
      --namespace string   Namespace of the artifact. (default "main")
  -o, --output string      Output format: plain, json (default "plain")
```
